case_title: ROBERT E. GONZALES VS. ANNE PAIGE MCCUNE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY GONZALES, ROBERT E. AS TO DEFENDANT MCCUNE, ANNE PAIGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALES, ROBERT E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCUNE, ANNE PAIGE $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,350.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,300 AS SHE HAS RETURNED THE TIFFANY WATCH TO PLAINTIFF WHICH IS THE BASIS OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
